author: gb9t
content:
Authoring start 2026-05-09. Preconditions met: Phase B complete; mm/ + arch/x86/ + security/ overviews drafted; default-on absorption table locked in security/00-overview.md; GR-RBAC + MPROTECT-exemption mechanisms decided.

Doc shape:
- Tier-1 (lives at .design/00-security-principles.md, sibling of other 00-* foundation docs)
- Frontmatter per 00-baseline.md convention
- REQ/AC structure
- Distills the row-1 absorption table from security/00-overview.md into binding form (sysctl/Kconfig/prctl/ELF-note names locked in)
- Specifies the new ELF note for JIT exemption (section, name, type, descriptor format) precisely enough for implementing instance to build
- Specifies PR_REQUEST_EXEC_GAIN prctl number + semantics
- Provides Hardening-section template every Tier-3 doc must follow
- Cross-refs grsec-pax-notes.md, security/00-overview.md, security/grbac/ (issue #5)
